EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpectralSensor

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to a Spectral Sensor Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("815DEA49-9B8D-45FB-9962-9EC89C5246E1")]
public interface ISpectralSensor

Properties

Characteristics

Gets the list of Spectral Sensor properties specific for the library type.

IPropertySet Characteristics { get; set; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

Examples

Sample Snippet

MaxWavelength

Gets the Maximum Wavelength value.

double MaxWavelength { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

MinWavelength

Gets the Minimum Wavelength value.

double MinWavelength { get; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SensorId

Gets the Spectral Sensor Id.

Guid SensorId { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

Examples

Sample Snippet

SensorName

Gets the Spectral Sensor name.

string SensorName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Examples

Sample Snippet

WavelengthUnits

Gets the Wavelength units.

WavelengthUnitType WavelengthUnits { get; set; }

Property Value

WavelengthUnitType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Wavelengths

Gets the array of wavelengths.

IDoubleArray Wavelengths { get; set; }

Property Value

IDoubleArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

WavelengthsCount

Gets the Wavelengths count of the Spectral Sensor.

int WavelengthsCount { get; }

Property Value

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

Methods

Create(Guid, string, IDoubleArray, WavelengthUnitType) 

void Create(Guid SensorId, string SensorName, IDoubleArray pWavelengths, WavelengthUnitType wlut)

Parameters

SensorId Guid
SensorName string
pWavelengths IDoubleArray
wlut WavelengthUnitType

GetTargetRasterWavelengthsAndSensorName(IRaster, out string, out IDoubleArray, out IDoubleArray, out IDoubleArray, out WavelengthUnitType) 

void GetTargetRasterWavelengthsAndSensorName(IRaster pRaster, out string pSensorName, out IDoubleArray ppTargetMinWavelengths, out IDoubleArray ppTargetMaxWavelengths, out IDoubleArray ppTargetCenterWavelengths, out WavelengthUnitType pWavelengthUnit)

Parameters

pRaster IRaster
pSensorName string
ppTargetMinWavelengths IDoubleArray
ppTargetMaxWavelengths IDoubleArray
ppTargetCenterWavelengths IDoubleArray
pWavelengthUnit WavelengthUnitType

GetTargetSensorWavelengthsAndGUID(string, out Guid, out IDoubleArray, out IDoubleArray, out WavelengthUnitType) 

void GetTargetSensorWavelengthsAndGUID(string targetSensor, out Guid pTargetGuid, out IDoubleArray ppTargetMinWavelengths, out IDoubleArray ppTargetMaxWavelengths, out WavelengthUnitType pWavelengthUnit)

Parameters

targetSensor string
pTargetGuid Guid
ppTargetMinWavelengths IDoubleArray
ppTargetMaxWavelengths IDoubleArray
pWavelengthUnit WavelengthUnitType

USGSBasicLoad(string, bool)

Loads the basic properties of a Spectral Sensor located in the specified path. No wavelengths are loaded.

void USGSBasicLoad(string Path, bool createId)

Parameters

Path string
createId bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

USGSFullyLoad(string, bool)

Loads all the properties of a Spectral Sensor, including wavelengths, located in the specified path.

void USGSFullyLoad(string Path, bool createId)

Parameters

Path string
createId bool

Examples

Sample Snippet
